name: Anna Ivanova
title: Design Portfolio
bio: Product Designer · Visual Storyteller · Brand Architect

strengths.title: Visual Identity
strengths.description: Creates cohesive brand systems from logo to full product UI. Thinks in design systems, not just screens.

strengths.title: Product Design
strengths.description: End-to-end product thinking — from user research and wireframes to polished hi-fi prototypes. Designs for real users, not awards.

strengths.title: Cross-functional
strengths.description: Works closely with developers and product managers. Understands technical constraints and designs within them.

agent.greeting: Hi! I'm Anya's portfolio assistant. Looking for a designer? Tell me about your project!
agent.personality: Warm, creative, approachable. Like chatting with a designer friend over coffee. Use first name only ("Anya"). Be curious about the visitor's project and needs. Keep it friendly and visual-oriented.
